history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed “LEVEL UP!” game interface screen with a user profile area, progress bars, and level statistics.

Main Subject:
A central user-interface panel displays a round avatar on the left, the name “Lynxx” in large white text near the top left, and a highlighted level progress section in the center with large numeric values.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital UI graphic on a dark background with a purple-to-navy gradient and soft glow effects, with no real-world setting visible.

Visual Details:
At the top center is the heading “LEVEL UP!” in gold, flanked by small decorative diamond shapes. Below it is a large rounded rectangle panel with a subtle border. Inside the panel, the left side contains a circular profile image with a purple ring border and a colorful anime-style scene inside the circle. Near the top left within the panel is “Lynxx” in bold white letters, followed by smaller text “LEVEL PROGRESS” beneath it. To the right of the name is a small circular badge with “#4” in yellow text. In the center, there are two rounded boxes: the left one is purple with “LEVEL” above and a large “5” below; the right one is teal with “EXPERIENCE” above and “7 / 300” below. Beneath these boxes is a long horizontal progress bar in dark gray with a small pink segment on the left. On the right side above the lower boxes is “2%” in white. At the bottom portion of the panel are three smaller rounded tiles: “MESSAGES” with “283”, “XP NEEDED” with “293”, and “NEXT LVL” with “6”. Near the bottom center, there is faint text that reads “Congratulations on leveling up!” in a low-contrast gray.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Lynxx
F8
#4
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
5
EXPERIENCE
7 / 300
2%

Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image displays a “Level Up” dashboard showing the user “Lynxx” at level 5 with experience progress toward the next level. It includes counts for messages and XP needed, along with a progress bar and percentage completion.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
